description: STING Owner Standards Pack — a rule-pack encoding the Owner's BIM modeling standards as configuration. Corporate starter baseline; merged by rule id over a project overlay at <project>/_BIM_COORD/owner_standards.json (project rules win by id; the Owner's week-1 standards are encoded here). Rule types: paramRequired (param non-empty on categories), paramPattern (value matches/forbids regex), paramInList (value in list), familyNamePattern, typeNamePattern (family/type name matches/forbids regex per category), worksetPattern (workset names match regex), viewNamePattern, sheetNumberPattern, tagSchemeConsistent (rendered scheme strings match current tokens — delegates to TagSchemeRenderer). Severity BLOCK/WARN/INFO drives the RAG summary. 'source' cites the Owner doc section and is shown to the client. Set 'enabled': false to ship a rule disabled.

rules.description: Project code must be set on Project Information (drives ISO 19650 container naming + tag schemes).
rules.source: BEP — Project information / ISO 19650-2 container naming

rules.description: Originator code must be set on Project Information.
Worksets should be prefixed with a building code (BLD1..BLD6 or EXT) so site elements without rooms still resolve their LOC (e.g. BLD2_Mechanical).
Every enabled tag scheme's rendered identifier must match the element's current tokens (no hand-edited or stale scheme tags).
rules.source: STING tag-scheme contract (Phase 191) — derived, never hand-edited

rules.description: Discipline code must be one of the agreed ISO 19650 discipline codes.
Sheet numbers should follow the ISO 19650 container form KUT-ZZZ-XX-XX-M3-A-0001. Ships DISABLED — enable once the Owner's number table is confirmed in week 1.
MEP equipment families must not be generic/placeholder by the coordination set.
rules.source: Owner BIM standard — model maturity / no placeholder families
